title: E-commerce Admin Dashboard
description: A high-performance admin panel for tracking sales and inventory.
longDescription: This comprehensive dashboard built for e-commerce managers provides real-time insights into sales performance, inventory levels, and customer behavior. It features complex data visualizations using Chart.js, a robust state management system with Zustand, and a high-performance backend powered by Prisma and PostgreSQL.

title: AI Content Studio
description: Integration of Gemini API for automated content creation.
longDescription: AI Content Studio is a powerful tool designed for creators. By leveraging the Google Gemini API, it allows users to generate high-quality blog posts, social media captions, and product descriptions in seconds. The application features a sleek, intuitive UI built with Next.js and Framer Motion.

title: Minimalist Portfolio v1
description: A modern, interactive portfolio built with Next.js and GSAP.
longDescription: My previous portfolio iteration focused on pure minimalist design and high-end animations. It showcased the power of GSAP for orchestrating complex entrance sequences and ScrollTrigger for interactive storytelling. This project laid the foundation for my current design philosophy.

title: POS Pro Cloud
description: Cloud-based point of sale system for retail businesses.
longDescription: POS Pro Cloud is a robust point of sale system designed for retailers of all sizes. It features offline support, real-time inventory synchronization across multiple locations, and comprehensive sales reporting. Built with Electron for desktop and React for the web client.

title: StayFlow Booking
description: Advanced hotel and apartment booking engine.
longDescription: StayFlow is a specialized booking engine built for the hospitality industry. It includes a dynamic pricing engine, channel manager integration, and a sleek guest booking portal. Optimized for high conversion rates and mobile devices.

title: Learnify LMS
description: Comprehensive learning management system for schools.
longDescription: Learnify LMS provides a seamless educational experience for both teachers and students. It features live video classes, automated grading, student progress tracking, and interactive quizzes. Built with performance and scalability in mind.

title: Enterprise Resource Planner
description: Comprehensive ERP system for manufacturing units.
longDescription: A heavy-duty ERP solution managing supply chains, payroll, HRM, and accounting. Built with a focus on data integrity and real-time reporting for large industrial units.
